description: Cloud replacement for mcp-server-filesystem — 20 tools for S3, Azure Blob, and GCS

cmd.description: One or more cloud root URIs (e.g. s3://my-bucket, az://my-container, gs://my-bucket)
Custom endpoint URL for S3-compatible storage (MinIO, RustFS, etc.)
cmd.name: --endpoint

cmd.description: Directory for filesystem cache store (required when --cache-store fs)
cmd.name: --cache-dir

cmd.description: Enable the delete_file tool (disabled by default for safety)
cmd.name: --enable-delete

cmd.description: Maximum number of objects grep_files will scan per call (default: 1000)
cmd.name: --grep-max-objects

cmd.description: Enable the shell tool for POSIX-like commands on cloud storage (disabled by default)
cmd.name: --enable-shell

name: io.github.nogoo9/mcp-server-cloud-fs

environmentVariables.description: Azure Blob Storage connection string (required when using the azure provider)
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING

environmentVariables.description: Google Cloud project ID (optional when using the gcs provider)
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT

environmentVariables.description: AWS Access Key ID (optional for S3 — falls back to ~/.aws/credentials or IAM role)
environmentVariables.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: AWS Secret Access Key (optional for S3 — falls back to ~/.aws/credentials or IAM role)
environmentVariables.name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Redis connection URL (required when --cache-store redis, defaults to redis://localhost:6379)
environmentVariables.name: REDIS_URL

runtimeArguments.description: One or more cloud root URIs (e.g. s3://my-bucket, az://my-container, gs://my-bucket)
Custom endpoint URL for S3-compatible storage (MinIO, RustFS, etc.)
runtimeArguments.name: --endpoint

runtimeArguments.description: Directory for filesystem cache store (required when --cache-store fs)
runtimeArguments.name: --cache-dir

runtimeArguments.description: Enable the delete_file tool (disabled by default for safety)
runtimeArguments.name: --enable-delete

runtimeArguments.description: Maximum number of objects grep_files will scan per call (default: 1000)
runtimeArguments.name: --grep-max-objects

runtimeArguments.description: Enable the shell tool for POSIX-like commands on cloud storage (disabled by default)
runtimeArguments.name: --enable-shell
